lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.04]STOMP your feet — boom boom boom!
[00:03.48]CLAP your hands — make some room!
[00:07.04]Stomp clap stomp clap, find the groove!
[00:10.54]Stomp clap Stingray, watch us move!
[00:14.16]STOMP your feet — boom boom boom!
[00:17.60]CLAP your hands — make some room!
[00:21.22]Faster, faster, don't stop now!
[00:24.74]Faster, faster, take a bow!
[00:28.22]STOMP CLAP STINGRAY CAY!
[00:31.74]STOMP CLAP STINGRAY CAY!
